[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001110010 4
1 111100010 5
2 000001110 3
3 000001010 2
4 011101010 5
5 111111111 a
6 100101010 4
7 111111111 a
